NAVAREA XIX 87/19

NORWEGIAN SEA1. SURVEY VESSEL MV RAMFORM VANGUARD  CS C6TU8 CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 25 AUG 2019 UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE TOWING 12 X 4.3 NM LONG CABLES IN SURVEY AREA BOUNDED BY: 
A. 65-53.71N 008-59.99EB. 65-45.23N 009-00.00EC. 65-44.04N 010-34.79ED. 64-60.00N 010-00.00EE. 65-00.00N 009-31.03EF. 65-11.03N 009-30.99EG. 65-11.24N 009-09.09E H. 65-00.00N 009-03.09EI. 65-00.02N 008-20.00EJ. 65-14.86N 008-19.72EK. 65-14.90N 007-59.97EL. 65-08.72N 007-59.94EM. 65-08.71N 007-38.69EN. 65-13.62N 007-43.97EO. 65-37.89N 007-43.98EP. 65-51.04N 008-14.92EQ. 65-53.93N 008-17.82ER. 65-53.71N 008-59.99E
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 6 NM ASTERN, 3 NM AHEAD AND ABEAM.MARKER BOUY WHIT A FLASHING LIGHT AT THE END OF EACH STREAMER. SUPPORT VESSEL, M.V. SANCO SEA CS ZDHF4 IN ATTENDANCE
